title: glechoma parnassica
intro: Glechoma parnassica, also known as Serbian mint or bee bread, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glechoma parnassica are numerous, including improving digestion, reducing anxiety and stress, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Glechoma parnassica can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
